zh.lifeSummary: 當John Thomas Darell Esq of Scotney 12 ggf於1516年出生時，他的父親William Darrell37歲，母親Lady Jane Darrell Hungerford26歲。他於1535年與Anne Hedley結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1598年享年82歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特。

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When John Thomas Darell Esq of Scotney 12 ggf was born in 1516, his father, William Darrell, was 37 and his mother, Lady Jane Darrell Hungerford, was 26. He married Anne Hedley in 1535. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1598, at the age of 82, and was buried in Kent, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: John Thomas Darell Esq of Scotney 12 ggf(이)가 1516년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Darrell(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Jane Darrell Hungerford(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1535년 Anne Hedley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1598년 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Thomas Darell Esq of Scotney 12 ggf родился в 1516 г., его отцу по имени William Darrell было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Jane Darrell Hungerford, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Hedley в 1535 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1598 г. в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Thomas Darell Esq of Scotney 12 ggf nació en 1516, su papá, William Darrell, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Lady Jane Darrell Hungerford, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Anne Hedley en 1535. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1598, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
